foundation.heading: Curated books and literary essays

metadata.title: Chaatde — Editorial Bookstore
metadata.description: A minimalist bilingual editorial blog and bookstore.

bookstore.title: Book catalog
bookstore.summary: Browse a quiet selection of literary books, essays, and editorial objects chosen for close reading.
bookstore.noBooks: No books match the current filters.
bookstore.sidebarBody: Use the filters to move between genres, editions, and formats without leaving the catalog rhythm.
bookstore.followUsBody: Stay close to new arrivals, essays, and readings through our editorial channels.
bookstore.detailSidebarBody: Pair each book with a slower reading practice: one author, one theme, and one format that fits the moment.
